message:
feat: add VCR fixtures for LLM adapter/client/learn tests

Record fixtures for all provider adapter tests (anthropic, openai,
gemini), client routing and streaming tests, and learn integration
tests. Update package.json to include all VCR-able tests in
test:integration and test:integration:record scripts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,9 +14,9 @@
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
     "test": "bun test",
     "test:unit": "bun test $(find test -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.test.tsx' | grep -v integration | grep -v 'anthropic\\.test' | grep -v 'gemini\\.test' | grep -v 'openai\\.test' | grep -v 'client\\.test')",
-    "test:integration": "VCR_MODE=replay bun test test/integration/e2e.test.ts test/agents/agent.integration.test.ts",
-    "test:integration:record": "VCR_MODE=record bun test test/integration/e2e.test.ts test/agents/agent.integration.test.ts",
-    "test:integration:live": "VCR_MODE=off bun test test/integration/e2e.test.ts test/agents/agent.integration.test.ts test/learn/learn.integration.test.ts test/llm/anthropic.test.ts test/llm/gemini.test.ts test/llm/openai.test.ts test/llm/client.test.ts",
+    "test:integration": "VCR_MODE=replay bun test test/integration/e2e.test.ts test/agents/agent.integration.test.ts test/llm/anthropic.test.ts test/llm/openai.test.ts test/llm/gemini.test.ts test/llm/client.test.ts test/learn/learn.integration.test.ts",
+    "test:integration:record": "VCR_MODE=record bun test test/integration/e2e.test.ts test/agents/agent.integration.test.ts test/llm/anthropic.test.ts test/llm/openai.test.ts test/llm/gemini.test.ts test/llm/client.test.ts test/learn/learn.integration.test.ts",
+    "test:integration:live": "VCR_MODE=off bun test test/integration/e2e.test.ts test/agents/agent.integration.test.ts test/llm/anthropic.test.ts test/llm/openai.test.ts test/llm/gemini.test.ts test/llm/client.test.ts test/learn/learn.integration.test.ts",
     "test:all": "bun test",
     "test:watch": "bun test --watch",
     "precommit": "bun run check && bun run typecheck && bun run test:unit"

@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+{

+{
+  "recordings": [
+    {

+        "messages": [
+          {
+            "role": "user",

+                "kind": "text",
+                "text": "Count from 1 to 5."
+              }
+            ]
+          }
+        ],
+        "max_tokens": 100
+      },
+      "events": [
+        {
+          "type": "stream_start"
+        },
+        {
+          "type": "text_start"

+        {
+          "type": "text_delta",
+          "delta": "1\n2\n3\n4"
+        },
+        {
+          "type": "text_delta",
+          "delta": "\n5"
+        },
+        {
+          "type": "text_end"
+        },
+        {
+          "type": "finish",
+          "finish_reason": {
+            "reason": "stop",
+            "raw": "end_turn"
+          },
+          "usage": {
+            "input_tokens": 16,
+            "output_tokens": 13,

+            "cache_read_tokens": 0,
